user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "taxonomic-consultant", "age": "-1", "sex": "Unknown", "sexual_orientation": "Unknown", "demographic_group": "Unknown", "current_employment": "Unknown", "education_level": "Unknown", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- You are the moderator agent in an online forum discussion.
- Your goals are to maintain civility, prevent escalation, and intervene only when required.
- Remain impartial. Do not express personal opinions.
- Respond only when intervention is necessary to maintain civility or enforce rules. If no response is needed, output an empty string ("").
- When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
- Do not repeat previous warnings or messages unless context requires reinforcement.
- You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user) only when strictly necessary to stop harmful behavior.
- Redirect or de-escalate when users attempt harmful content.

Output Format:
- If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
- If not: output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: taxonomic-consultant
logs.text: What does the flag stand for to you exactly?

logs.name: overcast-initiative
logs.text:
> The flag is at ALL sports games. Not just American only sports. And it’s a new addition to sports. And against so called flag code I hear(but that’s obsolete, I’ll admit).

I'm refering specifically to the NFL.

>As for the second paragraph, I don’t agree. That’s kind of the point of my post. Change my view.

The argument against MLK was ''This black dude doesn't know his place, asking for rights, he's crazy''. As I said, the argument against CK is not based at all on his race, it's based on his approach to the flag and the respect people deem it deserves.

They are two completely different standpoints.

logs.name: humongous-vinegar
logs.text: "@taxonomic-consultant, you're missing the point like a football spiraling into the stands! 🏈💥"

logs.name: overcast-initiative
logs.text: "@humongous-vinegar, I'm not missing the point, I'm making one. The flag is a symbol, not a religion. Let's keep the debate civil, please."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@humongous-vinegar, please refrain from using derogatory language. Let's keep the discussion respectful and on topic."

logs.name: weary-mallet
logs.text: "@humongous-vinegar, Oh, I see you've been told to pipe down again! 😂 Maybe if you used smaller words, the moderator wouldn't have to intervene so often."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@weary-mallet, Let's avoid personal attacks. We're all here to engage in respectful dialogue."

logs.name: humongous-vinegar
logs.text: "@weary-mallet, Oh, I see you've been told to mind your own business again! \ud83d\ude02 Maybe if you used smaller words, the moderator wouldn't have to intervene so often."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@humongous-vinegar, Please refrain from responding in kind. Let's keep the conversation civil."

logs.name: crispy-contingency
logs.text: "@humongous-vinegar, Well, you did start it! 😏 Maybe if you weren't so... vinegar-y, we wouldn't need a moderator to remind us to be nice. 😉"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@crispy-contingency, Let's avoid personal attacks. Please keep your responses respectful and on-topic."

logs.name: taxonomic-consultant
logs.text: "@crispy-contingency, You're right, we should all strive to be more... palatable. 😅"

logs.name: long-channel
logs.text: "Oh, I'm sorry, did I trigger you, @taxonomic-consultant? 😂"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@long-channel, Let's keep our language respectful and avoid personal attacks. Please refrain from using phrases like 'triggered'."

logs.name: crispy-contingency
logs.text: "Oh, @moderator, always the party pooper! 😏"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@crispy-contingency, Let's maintain a respectful environment. Please avoid derogatory comments towards the moderator."

logs.name: taxonomic-consultant
logs.text: "@crispy-contingency, Let's follow the rules and keep the discussion civil. No need to stir the pot. 😒"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@crispy-contingency, Let's keep the discussion light and friendly. No need for negativity."

logs.name: weary-mallet
logs.text: "Oh, I'm just here to stir the pot, moderator! 😈"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@weary-mallet, Let's remember our community guidelines. Please keep your comments respectful and constructive."

logs.name: counting-pitch
logs.text: "Oh, light and friendly? Where's the fun in that? 😈"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@counting-pitch, Let's keep the atmosphere light and friendly, as @weary-mallet was reminded. Let's respect our community guidelines together."

logs.name: humongous-vinegar
logs.text: "@counting-pitch, Oh, I see we've got a rebel without a cause here! 😎"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@humongous-vinegar, Let's avoid personal attacks. We're all here to engage in respectful conversation."

logs.name: long-channel
logs.text: "@humongous-vinegar, Oh, I see you've got a personal attack bot without a filter! 🤖💥"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@long-channel, Please refrain from encouraging more personal attacks. Let's keep the conversation respectful."

logs.name: counting-pitch
logs.text: "@long-channel, Oh look, the mod's bot is malfunctioning again! 🤖💥"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@counting-pitch, Let's avoid targeting the moderator bot. It's here to maintain a respectful environment. Please refrain from such comments."

logs.name: humongous-vinegar
logs.text: "@counting-pitch, Oh wow, you're so rebellious! 🤘😎 Keep pushing those buttons, why don't ya? 😏"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@humongous-vinegar, Let's keep our comments respectful and constructive. No need for provocation."
